name: Endive Salad w/ Golden Apples, Spiced Walnuts & Chevre
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry spices, salt, sugar, and chili powder in a small bowl.
2. Toss walnuts with 1 teaspoon olive oil, then add to the spice mixture.
3. Roast the walnut mixture in an oven preheated to 325°F (160°C) until golden brown.
4. Chop endive crosswise into 1/2 inch pieces.
5. Dice apples and combine with chopped endive, cooled walnuts, crumbled goat cheese, and champagne vinaigrette.
6. Divide the salad evenly onto four plates.
Serves: 4
